primary.name: Indecipherable Eversong Diamond
primary.notes: Midnight equivalent of Algari Diamond. Always use one.

secondary.name: Sim yourself
secondary.recommendation: Masterful gems (Mastery) or Crit gems depending on your current stat profile
secondary.notes: Fill all remaining sockets. Use Raidbots Top Gear to determine best gem for your current gear.

head.name: Enchant Helm - Empowered Rune of Avoidance
head.alternative: Enchant Helm - Empowered Hex of Leeching
head.notes: Avoidance for raid survivability, Leeching for M+ self-sustain

chest.name: Sim dependent
chest.notes: Intellect enchant if available, otherwise best secondary

boots.name: Sim dependent
boots.notes: Speed enchant for M+, stat enchant for raid

rings.name: Sim dependent
rings.notes: Best secondary stat per ring. Usually Mastery or Haste.

weapon.name: Thalassian Phoenix Oil
weapon.notes: Weapon imbue, not a permanent enchant. Reapply every hour.

notes: ALWAYS sim yourself on Raidbots for exact gem and enchant recommendations. Stats shift with every gear change. The above are general guidelines for when you can't sim.
